uplink._note: Inputs are the upstream r718ab-codec.yaml status example; expected.data authored here and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, Temp 25.38, Humi 68). Within bounds: humidity 0-100.

uplink.description: Low battery flag, sub-zero temperature, 30 % RH
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds: byte3=0x9C high bit set -> lowBattery, 2.8 V; temp 0xFF9C two's-complement -> -1.00 C; humidity 0x0BB8=3000 -> 30.00 %. Oracle from reference/upstream-codec.js: Volt '2.8(low battery)', Temp -1, Humi 30.
Synthetic in-bounds boundary: 3.0 V; temp 0x0000 -> 0.00 C; humidity 0x2710=10000 -> 100.00 % (upper vocabulary bound). Oracle from reference/upstream-codec.js: Volt 3, Temp 0, Humi 100.
Inputs are the upstream startup version example (reportType 0x00). Upstream returns SWver/HWver/Datecode device-info, which is not a normalized measurement; we surface an error.
Inputs are the upstream ConfigReportRsp example on fPort 7. Config frames carry no measurement; we reject any non-6 fPort.
